description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a symmetrical arrangement of black beads interspersed with sections of colored beads, including white, green, orange, and purple. The necklace is strung in a double-layered design, with the lower strand forming a gentle curve and adorned with a central cluster of white beads, creating a focal point. The beads appear to be made of polished materials, possibly glass or plastic, giving the necklace a glossy finish. The colored beads are distributed evenly along the upper portion, adding visual interest and contrast to the predominantly black design. The necklace is displayed on a neutral, matte-finished bust stand, which highlights its elegant drape and structure. The overall style is geometric and modern, with a touch of traditional beadwork.
description: A double-stranded beaded necklace with black, white, and multicolored beads, arranged in a symmetrical, geometric pattern. The necklace has a glossy finish and a central white bead cluster.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace draped on a bust, highlighting the central white bead cluster and the symmetrical arrangement of colored beads.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the necklace's curvature and the distribution of beads along the strand, with colored beads visible near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the necklace's closure area and the alignment of beads at the back, with less detail on the central cluster.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, displaying the necklace's profile and the placement of colored beads along the strand.
